releaseNotes: Search: fixed a real performance bug that made search return nothing on large libraries (added indices + query limits). Guide: tapping an already-live channel now opens full-screen. Settings: reorganized into categorized sections (General, Playlists, EPG, Playback, Parental controls, Channel groups, About) with playlist counts, per-playlist/update-all sync, EPG clear, resume-last-channel toggle, and a manual Check for Updates button. Note: this update clears locally cached channels/movies/shows once (a database schema change) - your playlist will need to resync, same as when you first added it.
